title: Invalid Custom Auth JSON error when using API to update credentials
symptom: After updating credentials via the n8n API, using them results in an 'Invalid Custom Auth JSON' error. The credentials only work after re-saving them in the UI.
not_this_if: Credentials are updated directly in the UI
No error occurs when using the credentials
root_cause: The n8n API expects the header configuration for Custom Auth credentials to be a stringified JSON value rather than a nested object. When updated via the API, the format may not match what n8n expects, leading to the error.
fix_steps: Ensure the 'json' field in the PATCH request is a stringified JSON value.
Example: Use JSON.stringify() on the headers object before sending the request.
agent_instruction: Update the credentials via the API with the 'json' field as a stringified JSON value.
